notes: Section, acts , ; , , provided for the administration of the agricultural experiment station program. See .Mar. 16, 1906, ch. 951, § 434 Stat. 64Feb. 24, 1925, ch. 308, § 443 Stat. 971section 361g of this title

Existing Rights and Liabilities, , which repealed sections 361, 364, 366, 369, 369a, 371 to 376, 380, 382, 383, 386 to 386f, 427a to 427h, and 427j of this title, provided in part that any rights or liabilities existing under such repealed sections or parts of sections should not be affected by their repeal.Act Aug. 11, 1955, ch. 790, § 269 Stat. 674
